# ATLAS: Embodied AI Data Infrastructure Learning Map

## For Agents: Start Here

[AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — Machine operation protocol (READ FIRST)
[docs/INDEX.md](docs/INDEX.md) — Human-readable documentation index

## Navigation by Intent

### Quick Links by Task

**→ Researching which MODEL to use?**
- Start: [01-foundation/index.md](docs/01-foundation/index.md)
- Topics: VLM底座, World Model, VLA端到端

**→ Designing ANNOTATION schemas?**
- Start: [02-annotation/index.md](docs/02-annotation/index.md)
- Topics: Schema设计, 动作/场景/物理标注

**→ Implementing PERCEPTION algorithms?**
- Start: [03-perception/index.md](docs/03-perception/index.md)
- Topics: 双目+IMU, 深度估计(FoundationStereo), SLAM, 手势估计, 3D重建

**→ Choosing DATA collection setup?**
- Start: [04-data-ecosystem/index.md](docs/04-data-ecosystem/index.md)
- Topics: Ego-centric, UMI, Sim2Real, 遥操作, 硬件矩阵

**→ Understanding full SYSTEM integration?**
- Start: [05-integration/index.md](docs/05-integration/index.md)
- Topics: Pipeline模式, 质量门控, 系统设计

## Data Flow Architecture

Input data flows bottom-up, model decisions flow top-down:

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  05-integration     System Design       │ ← Deployment decisions
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  01-foundation      VLM/World Model/VLA │ ← Model selection
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  02-annotation      Schema/Standards    │ ← Annotation pipeline
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  03-perception      Stereo/Depth/SLAM   │ ← Perception stack
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  04-data-ecosystem  Ego/UMI/Sim2Real    │ ← Data collection
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Quick Facts

- **Layers**: 5 (Foundation, Annotation, Perception, Data, Integration)
- **Topics**: ~20-25 focused documents
- **Read time**: Per topic 10-15 minutes; Full tour 4-6 hours
- **Status tracking**: docs/_machine/status.yaml

## Top Priority Topics

Per project requirements:

1. **FoundationStereo** → docs/03-perception/02-depth-estimation.md
2. **双目+IMU协同** → docs/03-perception/01-stereo-imu.md
3. **VLA模型** → docs/01-foundation/03-vla.md
4. **硬件矩阵** → docs/04-data-ecosystem/05-hardware-matrix.md

## Cross-Reference Guide

| From | To | Typical Flow |
|------|-----|--------------|
| 04-data-ecosystem | 03-perception | Raw data → Perception output |
| 03-perception | 02-annotation | Features → Structured labels |
| 02-annotation | 01-foundation | Labels → Training data |
| 01-foundation | 05-integration | Models → Production system |

## Content Status

See [docs/_machine/status.yaml](docs/_machine/status.yaml) for:
- Completion status per topic
- Next planned content
- Known gaps

## Reference Library

- [references/papers/](references/) — Organized by topic
- [references/datasets.md](references/datasets.md) — Dataset comparison
- [references/tools.md](references/tools.md) — Code repositories

---

*ATLAS: Atlas of Technologies for Learning Autonomous Systems*
